name: clonely-fanz
description: CLONELY-FANZ Golden Boilerplate - AI Avatar Platform

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/backend
